final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics), minimalist, natural-poetic, warm-healing aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space with shallow depth-of-field treatment
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand mark as focal element
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs golden-hour, warm-healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the exact brand mark "RAN QIU"; must maintain generous negative space and shallow depth-of-field visual language
Avoid:
